headline: UBS Upgrades Solstice Advanced Mat to Buy, Lowers Price Target to $78
summary: UBS  analyst Joshua Spector   upgrades Solstice Advanced Mat (NASDAQ:SOLS) from Neutral to Buy and lowers the price target from $88 to $78.
